text.en: Adaptive React components for desktop and mobile
text.zh: PC + 移动端自适应组件库

tagline.en: One API that switches layouts automatically across breakpoints.
tagline.zh: 同一 API，自动适配桌面与移动布局

details.en: Table, Modal, Form, Select and more switch desktop / mobile layouts by breakpoint.
details.zh: Table、Modal、Form、Select 等组件按断点自动切换桌面 / 移动布局

details.en: Design tokens with CSS variables and first-class dark mode overrides.
details.zh: 基于 Design Tokens，支持 CSS 变量主题与暗色覆盖

details.en: Built for modern React with strict TypeScript types.
details.zh: 使用较新的 React 能力，TypeScript 严格类型

details.en: Component previews include desktop and phone side-by-side.
details.zh: 组件预览内置桌面 / 手机双端对照
